overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a sunlit medieval castle ruin. The character walks through stone archways and wooden gates, traversing from a fortified courtyard out onto a mountain trail with panoramic valley views.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge leading to main gate
main wooden gate opens automatically as character approaches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily up the dirt path toward the castle gate, crossing the wooden drawbridge

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with ivy covering the upper sections
large wooden fortress gate with vertical planks and metal reinforcements
wooden plank bridge with railings spanning a small ravine
weathered stone castle walls with moss and ivy growth
colorful wildflowers including red poppies and purple blooms lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a medieval castle ruin along a dirt path lined with wildflowers. A tall stone tower rises on the left while the main wooden gate looms ahead. The character crosses a wooden bridge as the gate automatically opens to allow entry.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with ruins and wooden scaffolding

events.description: passes through main gate into the castle courtyard interior
character turns left to explore the courtyard and examine the ruins
character turns right and heads toward the side exit gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the courtyard and explores the ruins, examining the stone walls and wooden structures before heading toward the side gate

entered.detail: stone archway of the main gate now behind the character
wooden support structures and planks against the castle walls
stone staircase leading up to higher levels of the ruin
stone archway on the far side of the courtyard
ivy-covered stone walls enclosing the courtyard space

segments.scene_description: Inside the castle courtyard, the character explores the sunlit ruins surrounded by ivy-covered stone walls. Wooden scaffolding stands against the left wall near a stone staircase. The character circles around, passing red flower beds, before heading toward a side wooden gate leading out of the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle side exit with rocky descent

events.description: side wooden gate opens and character exits the castle interior
character begins descending the rocky stairs and path down the mountainside

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the castle through a side gate and carefully descends the rocky path down the mountainside toward the valley

entered.detail: smaller wooden gate with vertical planks at the castle side exit
steep rocky trail with loose stones and gravel leading downhill
panoramic view of the green valley and distant mountains
simple wooden post fence lining the edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the castle through a side wooden gate onto a steep rocky descent. The path winds down the mountainside with wooden fences on the sides, offering expansive views of the green valley below. The stone walls of the castle recede as the character descends.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with valley views

events.description: emerges from castle confines onto open mountain trail with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the winding dirt trail through grassy hills with panoramic views of the distant valley and mountains

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through grassy hillsides
lush green grass covering the sloping terrain with scattered rocks
individual deciduous trees dotting the landscape
wide vista of the valley with forested areas and distant mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: Now on the open mountain trail, the character walks through rolling grassy hills under a bright blue sky. The castle ruins are left behind as the path winds through the natural landscape, offering unobstructed views of the expansive valley and distant mountain ranges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the fortified entrance of a medieval castle ruin out onto an expansive, sunlit mountain trail. It begins along a wildflower-lined dirt path, passing a tall stone tower before crossing a wooden bridge as the main gate opens to allow entry. As the camera moves into the courtyard, the scene shifts to sunlit ruins with ivy-covered walls and wooden scaffolding, circling past red flower beds toward a side exit. The perspective then transitions through a wooden gate onto a steep rocky descent, where the castle walls recede as the path winds down the mountainside behind wooden fences. Finally, the environment opens completely into rolling grassy hills under a bright blue sky, leaving the ruins behind for unobstructed views of a vast valley and distant mountain ranges.
